summary: Full e2e testing of HELIOS AI Game Engine. Backend APIs tested via pytest (3/4 passing). All frontend features verified via Playwright - hero, navbar, forge section, gallery, teacher dashboard, footer, agent pipeline all working correctly.

minor.issue: Empty prompt returns 502 (gateway timeout) instead of 400/422 - no input validation for empty prompts. AI call is made even with empty string.

issues: Diagonal colored beam/slash decoration overlaps the forge input area and forge button - slightly distracting but not blocking interaction

action_items: Add input validation for empty prompt in /api/generate-game - return 400 with meaningful message instead of calling AI with empty string
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: No input validation for empty prompt in /api/generate-game - should validate prompt is non-empty before calling Claude API
server.py: Uses claude-4-sonnet-20250514 model name - verify this is correct model identifier for Emergent LLM integration
seed_data_creation: Saved one test game to gallery via POST /api/gallery
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features working. Backend: health, gallery CRUD pass. Frontend: loader (5s wait needed), hero stats, custom cursor (cursor:none), particle canvas, navbar, forge section with dropdowns/toggles/theme chips, forge button triggers agent pipeline with 4 agents (Architect/Artist/Coder/QA), gallery 6 cards, How It Works 4 steps, teacher dashboard, footer with India badge - all verified. The AI game generation was triggered successfully and shows animated pipeline. No critical bugs found.
test_features_verified: 2. Hero section: GAME FORGE title, 60s/4 agents/infinity stats, ticker scrolling, CTA buttons
3. Custom cursor: body cursor:none (custom cursor active)
5. Navbar: HELIOS logo, nav links, FORGE NOW button
6. Forge section: textarea, 4 dropdowns, 3 toggles, theme chips, FORGE MY GAME button
7. Forge button calls /api/generate-game - triggers agent pipeline
8. Agent pipeline: 4 agent cards (Architect/Artist/Coder/QA), progress bar, stage list
11. Teacher Mode toggle: opens Command Center dashboard with student analytics
12. Footer: links, India badge, social icons
